top_signals.title: Flood Warnings for South China Farmlands Raise Rice-Crop Risks
top_signals.summary: Forecasts for heavy rains in southern China over the next week are raising the risk of flash floods, potentially inundating crops and damaging rice fields.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saudis Lower July Oil Prices, Though Still at Decades High
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia cut the price of its main crude grade to Asia for a second straight month, though the premium for barrels to the kingdom’s largest market remained near the highest in decades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Copper Rebounds From Friday Slump on China-Buying and US Flows
top_signals.summary: Copper edged up to recoup some of last week’s losses as buying activity in China and flows of metal to the US supported the demand outlook.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Xi lands in North Korea for Kim meeting
top_signals.summary: Chinese leader’s first trip to Pyongyang in 7 years comes as regime has stepped up rhetoric of nuclear expansion
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why
top_signals.summary: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.
